args.code: (() => { const el = document.elementFromPoint(650, 520); let target = el; while (target && target.tagName !== 'BUTTON') { target = target.parentElement; } if (target) { target.click(); return 'clicked ' + target.tagName + ' text=' + target.textContent.trim().slice(0,20); } else { el.click(); return 'clicked raw'; } })()
